feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Fiori
feed.subtitle: SAP Fiori Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: migrate data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public), suggestion?
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
Is there any possible way to migrate data from SAP R/3 (Version 4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Public)? Could you please suggest the possible methods?

entry.title: How to do create with Odata V4 with Guid on Item with association
entry.content:
I have 2 CDS views a header and an item and it's Odata v4. The item has an association with the header. Because of the association I am not allowed to directly perform a Create on the item in the front-end. Because of the association I am not allowed to turn on Create in the behaviour definition in the item. It seems like I have to do the create via the header (not sure?) and then to the item. In addition I get an error message on MissionNeedsID. This is a GUID. My question is:

how do I do a create on an item that has an association?

how do I pass a GUID to the back-end in the right way? 

Front-end:

 const binding = oExtensionApi
        .getModel()
        .bindList("/MissionNeeds/MissionNeedsItem");

      const payLoad = {
        MissionNeedsID: selectedLine.MissionNeedsID,
                 _Item: { MissionNeedsID: selectedLine.MissionNeedsID, 
                          Product: selectedLine.Product, 
                          Quantity: "2.000", 
                          Unit: "ST",
                 },
      };

      binding.create(payLoad);

      binding.attachCreateCompleted((oEvent) => {
        console.log(oEvent);
      });

 Behaviour definition:

managed implementation in class zcl_mission_needs_behv unique; 
define behavior for ZR_MN_MissionNeeds alias MissionNeeds
persistent table zmn_missneeds
etag master LocalLastChangedAt
lock master
authorization master ( instance )
 
{
 
  field ( numbering : managed ) MissionNeedsID;
 
  field ( readonly )
  MissionNeedsID,
 
  Status,
 LoanHolderUser,
 
  CreatedAt,
  CreatedBy,
  LastChangedAt,
  LocalLastChangedAt,
  LocalLastChangedBy;
 
  create;
  update;
  delete;
 
  determination setStatus on modify { create; }
  determination setLoanHolderUser on modify { create; }
  determination setLastChangedAt on modify { create; }
 

  association _Item { create; } 
 
  mapping for ZMN_MISSNEEDS
  {
    MissionNeedsID = MISSION_NEEDS_ID;
    FromPlant = FROM_PLANT;
    FromStorageLocation = FROM_STORAGE_LOCATION;
    ToPlant = TO_PLANT;
    ToStorageLocation = TO_STORAGE_LOCATION;
    Status = STATUS;
    LoanHolderUser = LOAN_HOLDER_USER;
    Picker = picker;
    MissionName = mission_name;
    CreatedBy = CREATED_BY;
    CreatedAt = CREATED_AT;
    LocalLastChangedBy = LOCAL_LAST_CHANGED_BY;
    LocalLastChangedAt = LOCAL_LAST_CHANGED_AT;
    LastChangedAt = LAST_CHANGED_AT;
  }
}
 
define behavior for ZR_MN_MissionNeedsItem alias MissionNeedsItem
persistent table zmn_missnd_item
lock dependent by _MissionNeeds
authorization dependent by _MissionNeeds
 
{
  field ( numbering : managed ) MissionNeedsItemID;
 
  field ( readonly )
  MissionNeedsItemID,
  MissionNeedsID,
  Product,
  Quantity,
  Unit,
  CreatedAt,
  CreatedBy,
  LastChangedAt,
  LocalLastChangedAt,
  LocalLastChangedBy;
 
 
//    create;
  update;
  delete; 
 
  association _MissionNeeds { }
 
  mapping for ZMN_MISSND_ITEM
  {
    MissionNeedsItemID = MISSION_NEEDS_ITEM_ID;
    MissionNeedsID = MISSION_NEEDS_ID;
    Product = PRODUCT;
    Quantity = QUANTITY;
    Unit = UNIT;
    CreatedBy = CREATED_BY;
    CreatedAt = CREATED_AT;
    LocalLastChangedBy = LOCAL_LAST_CHANGED_BY;
    LocalLastChangedAt = LOCAL_LAST_CHANGED_AT;
    LastChangedAt = LAST_CHANGED_AT;
  }
}

entry.title: Error 'This process is unavailable or is configured incorrectly' in My Inbox app (SAP ECC)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I need your help with one of the issue in facing in configuring My Inbox app. I have configured Process Inbox by following Implementation Documentation from FIORI App Library.

I have a PO Approval workflow which I am able to see in my My Inbox app as well but when I am clicking on Open Task button, I am getting error page with 'This process is unavailable or is configured incorrectly' message.

Kindly help me with the process to display PO details in My Inbox app.

Environment

  • GBX01HR5
  • UIHR002

entry.title: Is it possible to change setting of list report filter?
entry.content:
Hi all, I am using fiori template - list report to generate CAP App. I found that all the drop-down filter fields are only list 10 results or less, also I found below message - "READ AE { '$select': 'department_name,email', '$skip': '0', '$top': '10' }" in the application log.

So, is it possible to change or eliminate restrictions of only return top 10 records?

Thanks a lot.

entry.title: How do I adjust Fiori login error messages texts?
entry.content:
Hey folks,

I am developing a custom Fiori Launchpad login screen and a part of the requirements is to have slightly different error descriptions instead of the default ones ("Enter your user", "Enter a password", etc.), as on the following screenshot:

I have adjusted the login procedure as per various known guides, i.e., modified login procedure in SICF, created my custom class that inherits from /UI2/CL_SRA_LOGIN, made some tweaks in html templates, css files, INIT_DEFAULT_PROPERTIES method of my custom class, etc. - no problems with that. But it turned out that message texts aren't accessible from /UI2/CL_SRA_LOGIN or its descendants. I made some research and found out that those texts are fetched in private method 'LOAD_TEXT' of class CL_ICF_SYSTEM_LOGIN, which is a parent class of /UI2/CL_SRA_LOGIN, and the texts are pulled from textpool of that class (namely, texts 041 and 042). Since this method is private, I can't redefine it and modify the texts... Unfortunately, debugging of login screens is also quite complicated, as runtime execution is happening on client 000 (because we're not even logged in to any "normal" clients yet) and I don't have proper authorizations to do that.

Do you guys maybe know (or had the same problem) if there's a way to modify such texts? Any suggestions are welcome, even "dirty" ones.

entry.title: Error: Content Security Policy : Failed to execute module factory for ''sap/gantt/library.js'
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have followed the below tutorial to create a Fiori Elements application.

Create an Incident Management App with SAP Fiori Elements for OData V4

I can execute the project locally, but after deploying it to BTP Cloud Foundry, I am getting the below error. This comes when I try to open the object page. And the object page does not load.

version : 1.124.0

Any idea here how to resolve? Below is the code repository:

CSPanda21/CAP_FioriElement: CAP project with Fiori elements (github.com)

  SAP Fiori Elements   SAP Fiori Launchpad    SAP Fiori Cloud  

ERROR:

Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/gantt/simple/GanttChartContainer.js'
-> 'sap/gantt/library.js'
-> 'sap/gantt/config/Mode.js': failed to execute module factory for ''sap/gantt/library.js'
-> 'sap/gantt/config/Mode.js'': Failed to execute 'sap/gantt/config/Mode.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:".

@boghyon

entry.title: Fiori Elements Adoption
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I have a requirement to enhance the standard Fiori elements app.

Requirements details as below -

I have one standard Fiori app.

I need to add one button, marked in this screen.
After press new create screen will come as bellow 

here all fields are custom. After fill all details and press SUBMIT button, record should come in original existing list with new fields respectively or i have to create new tab (indicate in first screen ) to display newly created records there.  

What is the best way to approach this ?

entry.title: Custom document type not available in filter in app, Manage Purchase Order.
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have created document types for PO in Sap Gui but I am not able to display them in the fiori app. I created document types with specific screen layout. But only document types with certain screen layout like NBB are available in the Manage Purchase Order app.

Is it possible to set it up?

entry.title: Can you provide suggestions for migrating data from SAP R/3 (4.7) to SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public)?
entry.content:
Hi ,
Aside from the staging table approach, can data migration be achieved using standard iFlows in SAP Cloud Platform Integration, or would we need to create custom iFlows or custom programs for this purpose?

Are there any other methods or third-party tools that can be used?

entry.title: connection between sap btp and a s/4 hana cloud private system
entry.content:
Hello to everyone,
I have been reading this course: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/extending-sap-s-4hana-with-sap-build-apps-and-key-user-extensibility/establishing-connectivity-between-sap-s-4hana-cloud-and-sap-btp_f3d6df41-c36c-450b-8ae8-79534e043fa1 . 

and many doubts arose.
The first one is: Do I have to have the Communication Systems application implemented, in order to make the connection between BTP and my S/4 HANA system?
the second doubt is: Can it be that to connect BTP with S/4 HANA Cloud Private and S/4 HANA on-premise I have to use Cloud Connector, but for S/4 HANA Cloud Public I don't have to use it?

Help please, I am lost with this.
Thanks and greetings to all,

entry.title: Can we set CFL fields to display only in standard fiori app ?
entry.content: Hi All, we have few custom fields added in Manage Billing Document. Is there a way we can set these field to display only when user is editing other standard field?

entry.title: Issue with sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding#create
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am refereing the SAP documentation to implement inline row creation in sap.ui.table.Table with OData V2 model, utilizing the create() method from the sap.ui.model.odata.v2.ODataListBinding library.

ODataListBinding#create

https://ui5.sap.com/#/topic/6c47b2b39db9404582994070ec3d57a2%23loio4c4cd99af9b14e08bb72470cc7cabff4

As per document i am getting the Rows context for the table and trying to use create() method. So, the entry is visible at the table without the need to first save it to the backend and then refresh the binding  but the create() method is not defined.

********************Code Start ************************************

<!-- sap.ui.table.Table control declared in XML view -->
<Table id="ToLineItems" rows="{
events : {createActivate : '.onCreateActivateLineItem'}
path : 'ToLineItems'
}">

// controller coding

// initial creation of inline creation rows when data has been loaded
onInit : function () {
var oItemsBinding = this.getView().byId("ToLineItems").getBinding("rows");

oItemsBinding.attachEvent("dataReceived", function () {
// check that length is final before creating at end and only create inactive entry once
if (oItemsBinding.isLengthFinal() && oItemsBinding.isFirstCreateAtEnd() === undefined) {
that.onCreateActivateLineItem();
}
});
},

// event handler for createActivate
onCreateActivateLineItem : function (oEvent) {
// product id is a required property for the item => item remains inactive if it's not set
if (!oEvent.getParameter("context").getProperty("ProductID")) {
oEvent.preventDefault();
return;
}

var oItemsBinding = this.getView().byId("ToLineItems").getBinding("rows");
oItemsBinding.create({/* initial data*/}, /*bAtEnd*/ true, {inactive : true});
}

**************************Code End *************************

Could you please provide any advice or suggestions?

Regards,

Sandeep

entry.title: Focus for search field in custom card
entry.content:
Hey Folks,

I have a small problem with the custom card. I developed a Fiori elements app and added a custom card to the analytical list page.

This custom card includes sap.m.table and two SearchFields. The problem is that the focus will not set to the search field when I click. The fields can only be activated by clicking on the magnifier glas or right click.

I also tried normal input field ... removed everything from the card except the search field. Always the same behavior. 

Hover over the searchButtons will work as expected! It seems to be a bug in the custom card.

Do you have an idea?

entry.title: How to hide table columns dynamically in Fiori Elements Analytical List Page based on Filter values?
entry.content:
Dear all,
We have one requirement in CAP application. We are using ALP Floor plan to build Fiori app.
We need to change the visibility of Table columns dynamically based on filter value from Filter bar either it is Visual filter or compact filter bar.
We have checked dynamic expressions in annotations but it is hiding only table cell value not column. 

https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/advanced/odata#dynamic-expressions .
Any help will be appreciated.


Regards,
Venkatesh.

entry.title: How to extend a standard firoi application in SAP BAS?
entry.content:
Hello folks, Im new to SAP Fiori /UI5....I have been exploring with the concept of how to extend the standard fiori application..

For starters I have disabled one button -  'Create' in the app: Manage sales order

 

Now I want to disable one of the table columns and one filterbar/value help as well..

Can anyone let me know how I can do that....?

Thanks in advance:)

entry.title: How to Trigger LDAP to EWM (TU is created in EWM)
entry.content: How to Trigger LDAP to EWM (TU is created in EWM)

entry.title: SAP CAP Deployed application UI returning Not-Found error
entry.content:
I have deployed a CAP Application with UI and Approuter. When I test the application locally the UI is visible and the service is accessible. When I deploy the app to BTP, it is not loading the welcomFile mentioned in approuter xs-app.json. It is giving 404 not found error.

Folder structure

 

 

UI xs-app.json

Approuter xs-app.json

The UI was generated automatically. No changes are done so far

 

Error

entry.title: ValueHelp Operator problem with Fior elements filter
entry.content: Hi experts, I drew a filter with fiori element in public cloud environment, some apps default to equal to when I press value Help, and some apps (page) are contains, do you know what makes the difference between the two? I was asked to set the default to contains, but I have no idea. Please help me

entry.title: Unable to access SAP BAS in SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I'm using my trail account for SAP BTP and when I'm trying to launch SAP BAS from my trail account it says 

"Check Your Trial Account We could not open SAP Business Application Studio.
Check that your trial account has not been suspended. If needed, click the "Extend Free Trial" button in the cockpit.
I read some online blogs and added all the entitlements to my sub account. I even deleted my sub account twice and added all the entitlements but still the result is same.
Anyone please help me with this issue.

 

 
Thanks,
Karthik

entry.title: how to show special characters in file name after downloading it to our personal PC using uploadSet
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have a requirement to show special characters in file name after downloading it to our laptop.

While uploading a file(uploadSet control has been used), I have given encodeURIComponent(filename) to show special characters. But while downloading it, the special characters are replaced with "#".

Could you please help me here in resolving this issue?

 

Thanks & Regards,

Asha
